model_architecture.ResNet18: Pretrained ResNet18 from torchvision.models, layer4+fc fine-tuned

transforms.aug_transform: Resize(96x96) -> RandomHorizontalFlip -> RandomRotation(10) -> ColorJitter -> ToTensor -> Normalize(0.5, 0.5)
transforms.resnet_transform: weights.transforms() - automatic preprocessing for pretrained ResNet18
